scripts.dev: echo 'Usa npm run dev:main, npm run dev:all, o dev:hub + servicios — ver README.md'
scripts.dev:main: node scripts/check-dev-ports.mjs main && concurrently -n CORE,GPULSE,READY -c green,blue,gray "npm run dev:core-api" "npm run dev:gpulse" "node scripts/wait-and-ready.mjs main"
scripts.dev:all:exec: concurrently -n CORE,GPULSE,BACKOFFICE,READY -c green,blue,magenta,gray "npm run dev:core-api" "npm run dev:gpulse" "npm run dev:backoffice" "node scripts/wait-and-ready.mjs all"
scripts.dev:all: node scripts/check-dev-ports.mjs all && npm run dev:all:exec
scripts.dev:all:stable:exec: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false -n CORE,GPULSE,ADMIN_CORE,BACKOFFICE,READY -c green,blue,magenta,yellow,gray "npm run dev:core-api:multi" "npm run dev:gpulse" "npm run dev:admin-core" "cd apps/backoffice && npm run dev" "node scripts/wait-and-ready.mjs all"
scripts.dev:all:stable: node scripts/check-dev-ports.mjs all && npm run dev:all:stable:exec
scripts.dev:all:stable:full:exec: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false -n CORE,GATE,GPAPI,ADMIN,GPULSE,BACKOFFICE,READY -c green,cyan,red,magenta,blue,yellow,gray "npm run dev:core-api:multi" "cd backend/api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd backend/gpulse-api && npm run dev" "npm run dev:admin-core" "npm run dev:gpulse" "cd apps/backoffice && npm run dev" "node scripts/wait-and-ready.mjs full"
scripts.dev:all:stable:full: node scripts/check-dev-ports.mjs full && npm run dev:all:stable:full:exec
